rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed inside `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax in component type or implementation annexes.
Implementation-level bindings such as assignments are valid only in component implementation annexes.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture scope when inserting annex blocks.
Use component implementation annexes for implementation-specific AGREE bindings.
Avoid inserting clauses that reference opaque data types in range comparisons without numeric scalar representation.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes are for bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not insert implementation-level assignments into component type annexes.
Do not include unsafe Boolean-to-integer conversions in AGREE clauses.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE contract generation and clause assignment
